canonical_definition: A referring-expression benchmark suite consisting of RefCOCO, RefCOCOg, and RefCOCO+ for evaluating object localization from language descriptions.
papers: Re-Aligning Language to Visual Objects with an Agentic Workflow

definitions.text: A referring-expression benchmark suite consisting of RefCOCO, RefCOCOg, and RefCOCO+ for evaluating object localization from language descriptions.
definitions.paper: Re-Aligning Language to Visual Objects with an Agentic Workflow

definitions.text: A collection of datasets for the task of Referring Expression Comprehension (REC), which requires localizing an object in an image based on a natural language description.

relationships.evidence: In Table 4, we compare CUBE-LLM to the state-of-the-arts in Referring Expression Comprehension (REC) benchmark on refCOCO/+/g (Yu et al., 2016) dataset. (Section 4.4)

characterization: A referring-expression benchmark suite consisting of RefCOCO, RefCOCOg, and RefCOCO+ for evaluating object localization from language descriptions.

iclr25: Re-Aligning Language to Visual Objects with an Agentic Workflow
